{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/CROSSREFS.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. Перекрёстные ссылки

{quote}[!TIP]{quote}
{quote}Этот документ описывает MVP-подход. Начните с него для быстрого прототипа.{quote}



h2. Проекты → файлы

Для каждого проекта — в каких файлах он упоминается.

|| Проект || Файлов || Где упоминается ||
|| **AI Factory** || 48 || `docs/01-svyazi/01-executive-summary.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/03-component-catalog.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/04-ensembles-overview.md` +45 ||
|| **AIF Handoff** || 32 || `docs/01-svyazi/01-executive-summary.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/03-component-catalog.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/04-ensembles-overview.md` +29 ||
|| **AgentFS** || 73 || `docs/01-svyazi/01-executive-summary.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/03-component-catalog.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/04-ensembles-overview.md` +70 ||
|| **Auto AI Router** || 54 || `docs/01-svyazi/01-executive-summary.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/03-component-catalog.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/04-ensembles-overview.md` +51 ||
|| **AutoResearch** || 28 || `docs/01-svyazi/01-executive-summary.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/03-component-catalog.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/04-ensembles-overview.md` +25 ||
|| **Automerge** || 14 || `docs/01-svyazi/03-component-catalog.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/04-ensembles-overview.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/10-second-order-ensembles.md` +11 ||
|| **CardIndex** || 70 || `docs/01-svyazi/01-executive-summary.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/03-component-catalog.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/04-ensembles-overview.md` +67 ||
|| **Firecrawl** || 12 || `docs/02-anthropic-vacancies/365-развёрнутый-анализ-внуковой-комбинации.md`, `docs/04-ai-collaborations/00-intro.md`, `docs/05-habr-projects/memory/memnet.md` +9 ||
|| **Graph RAG** || 41 || `docs/01-svyazi/01-executive-summary.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/02-methodology.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/03-component-catalog.md` +38 ||
|| **Hybrid RAG** || 24 || `docs/01-svyazi/01-executive-summary.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/03-component-catalog.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/04-ensembles-overview.md` +21 ||
|| **Legal RAG** || 39 || `docs/01-svyazi/01-executive-summary.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/02-methodology.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/03-component-catalog.md` +36 ||
|| **LiteLLM** || 31 || `docs/01-svyazi/01-executive-summary.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/03-component-catalog.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/04-ensembles-overview.md` +28 ||
|| **LiteParse** || 51 || `docs/01-svyazi/01-executive-summary.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/02-methodology.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/03-component-catalog.md` +48 ||
|| **MemNet** || 37 || `docs/01-svyazi/01-executive-summary.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/03-component-catalog.md`, `docs/03-technology-combinations/02-knowledge-graphs.md` +34 ||
|| **Memory OS** || 17 || `docs/01-svyazi/01-executive-summary.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/03-component-catalog.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/06-security-privacy.md` +14 ||
|| **NGT Memory** || 56 || `docs/01-svyazi/03-component-catalog.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/04-ensembles-overview.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/07-mvp-planning.md` +53 ||
|| **RLM-Toolkit** || 4 || `docs/01-svyazi/01-executive-summary.md`, `docs/02-anthropic-vacancies/365-развёрнутый-анализ-внуковой-комбинации.md`, `docs/04-ai-collaborations/00-intro.md` +1 ||
|| **Rufler** || 58 || `docs/01-svyazi/01-executive-summary.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/03-component-catalog.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/04-ensembles-overview.md` +55 ||
|| **SENTINEL** || 62 || `docs/01-svyazi/01-executive-summary.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/03-component-catalog.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/04-ensembles-overview.md` +59 ||
|| **Sequential** || 43 || `docs/01-svyazi/01-executive-summary.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/03-component-catalog.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/04-ensembles-overview.md` +40 ||
|| **Svyazi** || 132 || `docs/01-svyazi/00-intro-part2.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/01-executive-summary.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/02-methodology.md` +129 ||
|| **Tool Search** || 32 || `docs/01-svyazi/01-executive-summary.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/03-component-catalog.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/04-ensembles-overview.md` +29 ||
|| **Whisper** || 11 || `docs/01-svyazi/03-component-catalog.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/04-ensembles-overview.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/14-limitations.md` +8 ||
|| **Wikontic** || 28 || `docs/02-anthropic-vacancies/341-приложение-c-образец-спецификаций-инструментов-ing.md`, `docs/02-anthropic-vacancies/342-что-такое-вариант-c-concept-document-для-anthropic.md`, `docs/02-anthropic-vacancies/354-существующий-landscape-collaborators-твоя-working-.md` +25 ||
|| **Yjs** || 18 || `docs/01-svyazi/03-component-catalog.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/04-ensembles-overview.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/10-second-order-ensembles.md` +15 ||
|| **Yodoca** || 78 || `docs/01-svyazi/01-executive-summary.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/03-component-catalog.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/04-ensembles-overview.md` +75 ||
|| **Yttri** || 11 || `docs/01-svyazi/03-component-catalog.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/04-ensembles-overview.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/14-limitations.md` +8 ||
|| **agent-memory-mcp** || 17 || `docs/01-svyazi/01-executive-summary.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/03-component-catalog.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/06-security-privacy.md` +14 ||
|| **knowledge-space** || 58 || `docs/01-svyazi/03-component-catalog.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/04-ensembles-overview.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/07-mvp-planning.md` +55 ||
|| **mclaude** || 48 || `docs/01-svyazi/01-executive-summary.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/03-component-catalog.md`, `docs/01-svyazi/04-ensembles-overview.md` +45 ||

h2. Файлы → проекты

Топ-20 файлов с наибольшим числом упоминаемых проектов.

|| Файл || Проектов || Список ||
|| `docs/TABLES.md` || 28 || Svyazi, CardIndex, AgentFS, knowledge-space, mclaude, AI Factory +22 ||
|| `docs/01-svyazi/03-component-catalog.md` || 27 || Svyazi, CardIndex, AgentFS, knowledge-space, mclaude, AI Factory +21 ||
|| `docs/04-ai-collaborations/00-intro.md` || 27 || Svyazi, CardIndex, AgentFS, knowledge-space, AI Factory, AIF Handoff +21 ||
|| `docs/04-ai-collaborations/03-карта-найденных-проектов-и-паттернов.md` || 27 || Svyazi, CardIndex, AgentFS, knowledge-space, mclaude, AI Factory +21 ||
|| `docs/01-svyazi/04-ensembles-overview.md` || 24 || Svyazi, CardIndex, AgentFS, knowledge-space, mclaude, AI Factory +18 ||
|| `docs/02-anthropic-vacancies/365-развёрнутый-анализ-внуковой-комбинации.md` || 24 || Svyazi, CardIndex, AgentFS, knowledge-space, mclaude, AI Factory +18 ||
|| `docs/04-ai-collaborations/04-приоритетные-ансамбли.md` || 24 || Svyazi, CardIndex, AgentFS, knowledge-space, mclaude, AI Factory +18 ||
|| `docs/GRAPH.md` || 23 || Svyazi, CardIndex, AgentFS, knowledge-space, mclaude, AI Factory +17 ||
|| `docs/MINDMAP.md` || 23 || Svyazi, CardIndex, AgentFS, knowledge-space, mclaude, AI Factory +17 ||
|| `docs/01-svyazi/01-executive-summary.md` || 22 || Svyazi, CardIndex, AgentFS, mclaude, AI Factory, AIF Handoff +16 ||
|| `docs/CONCEPTS.md` || 22 || Svyazi, CardIndex, AgentFS, knowledge-space, mclaude, AI Factory +16 ||
|| `docs/04-ai-collaborations/01-executive-summary.md` || 21 || Svyazi, CardIndex, AgentFS, mclaude, AI Factory, AIF Handoff +15 ||
|| `docs/CODE_BLOCKS.md` || 21 || Svyazi, CardIndex, AgentFS, knowledge-space, mclaude, AI Factory +15 ||
|| `docs/01-svyazi/07-mvp-planning.md` || 19 || Svyazi, CardIndex, AgentFS, knowledge-space, mclaude, AI Factory +13 ||
|| `docs/01-svyazi/09-architectural-gaps.md` || 19 || Svyazi, CardIndex, AgentFS, knowledge-space, mclaude, AI Factory +13 ||
|| `docs/02-anthropic-vacancies/366-технический-stack-svyazi-2-0-foundation.md` || 19 || Svyazi, CardIndex, AgentFS, knowledge-space, mclaude, AI Factory +13 ||
|| `docs/04-ai-collaborations/05-план-прототипа-и-возможные-контакты.md` || 19 || Svyazi, CardIndex, AgentFS, knowledge-space, mclaude, AI Factory +13 ||
|| `docs/04-ai-collaborations/09-архитектурные-зазоры-которые-важнее-новых-инструме.md` || 19 || Svyazi, CardIndex, AgentFS, knowledge-space, mclaude, AI Factory +13 ||
|| `docs/04-ai-collaborations/14-ограничения-лицензии-и-что-пока-лучше-не-склеивать.md` || 19 || Svyazi, CardIndex, AgentFS, knowledge-space, mclaude, AI Factory +13 ||
|| `docs/01-svyazi/11-integration-contracts.md` || 18 || Svyazi, CardIndex, AgentFS, mclaude, AI Factory, LiteParse +12 ||
